productDisplayName: Nike Women As Statement Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, has graphic print on the chest and is engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean No matter how long the match goes on, you'll stand hard in this sun-blocking nike Statement tennis t-shirt, with a sweat-wicking, stretch fit for a front-to-back range of motion that covers every angle. Pair it with a tennis skirt or a pair of dri-fit capris for maximum performance.
